title: Cyclone in the UAE? NCM finally breaks silence on viral claims as thunderstorms lash emirates overnight
summary_full: Panic over a 'cyclone' in the UAE has been addressed by by the National Centre of Meteorology (NCM). The alarm was raised by strong winds and rains, present due to seasonal atmospheric instability but do they meet cyclone criteria? Officials urge reliance on official sources to combat misinformation and ensure public safety during intense, yet normal, weather patterns.
